text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While visiting a nearby town with Inari One...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, ya feelin' hungry yet? Wanna get somethin'
to eat?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This feels familiar. Didn't somethin' like this
happen back when we went for inari sushi?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya say we grab somethin' tasty again and
find a place with a good view? Kick back and
enjoy the finer things.
choice_data_list: Yeah, sure. Do you know this area well?
Yeah, sure. Do you know this area well?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Nah, not at all. No worries though.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Follow me! I promise ya won't regret it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we stroll around town looking for a restaurant,
Inari One stops in front of an old-fashioned store
selling dango rice dumplings.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'd say so, yeah. Most of the stores 'round here
are old, but here you can see the care they put
into the place by how tidy it is.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Plus, you can tell they're confident in their product! Just look at how they've got mitarashi dango written all big and eye-catchin'.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trusting Inari One's keen perception, we buy
some dango. And then...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Now, that's one helluva view! There's just
somethin' charmin' about the scenery in an
unfamiliar town.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
How's about we lay out the dango somewhere
'round here and chow down?

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text: Sob... sob...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh? Whazza matter, kid? Whatcha cryin' for?

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text:
I was on an adventure, and I forgot the way back
home. We've only just moved into the
neighborhood...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, pull yourself together, will ya? All that
cryin's just gonna make ya feel worse.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Bet you're hungry, aren't ya? Yeah, guess it's hard
to stay positive on an empty stomach.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're in luck! We just so happen to have some
tasty dango right here. Go ahead and dig in.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Well? Feel better now that your stomach's full?

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text: Yes. Thank you, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Looks like ya stopped cryin'. That's a good start!
Next up, we gotta getcha home. Do ya know your
address?

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It's written on this note.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like you've got smart parents! Now all
that's left is for the great Inari to zip ya there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I'm just gonna run this kid back to
his folks. Sit tight for a few minutes, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Inari One hoists the little boy onto her
back and dashes off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shared her dango and also took the boy
home, but here I am having done diddly-squat.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okey doke, I'm back! Got him home, safe and
sound!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whazzat? What're ya worryin' 'bout me for?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Seein' that kid's smile was enough to satisfy my
appetite!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, I guess the smile wasn't enough after all.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! This dango's from that store! Don't tell me
ya went back and bought me some?!
choice_data_list:
Well, I couldn't just stand around doing
nothing.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But, wasn't the store a good trek away? Ya make
it sound like it was an easy trip, but...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I see... you're tryna play it down. Pretty
classy move, I'd say!
choice_data_list: I learned it from you, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Knock it off! That's embarrassin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But ya know what? It really feels like we've
become fantastic partners.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh. Geez! When did ya become so
dependable?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One gives me a series of playful slaps on the
back.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. I promised to treat ya to somethin'
tasty. Ya almost made me forget!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Thanks to that kid's big smile and your classy move, this dango's gonna taste amazin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I end up making a surprisingly classy
memory eating dango together with Inari One.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh-ho, look at you, all fired up! I'm a bit
concerned, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Inari One suddenly starts poking my thigh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh, is it just me, or are these legs feelin' a bit
wobbly from all that runnin'?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh. Well, anyway. Ya seem a bit tired, so
let's take a breather and get somethin' sweet to
nibble on!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: We've both earned it, I'd say!
